subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous battlefield in Rajasthan was the site of the Maharana Pratap-Auranzeb Battle?
question_hi: राजस्थान में महाराणा प्रतिपक्ष, मैंस इन्डियाई के बाद महाराणा प्रतिपक्ष के बार्फेस्टर को जाने वाला एक महाराणा प्रतिपक्ष में कैसे बैठी गई थी?
राजस्थान में महाराणा प्रतिपक्ष को जानने के लिए एक महाराणा प्रतिपक्ष के बार्फेस्टर को जाने के लिए।

options.explanation_en: Mewar Fort is the name of the battlefield of Maharana Pratap. It is located in Udaipur district, Rajasthan.
options.explanation_hi: मेवार मंतर मंतर मंतर मंतर मर

options.explanation_en: Mewar Fort is the famous historical place located in Udaipur district, Rajasthan, which was the battlefield of Maharana Pratap. He fought his famous battle Chittorgarh.

answer.explanation_en: Mewar Fort is the name of the famous historical place located in Udaipur district, Rajasthan, which was the battlefield of Maharana Pratap. He fought his famous battle Chittorgarh.
